description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs the global before_script exporting VERSION, IMAGE and STACK, then executes "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", "docker build -t ${IMAGE} .", and "docker push ${IMAGE}", and records coverage using the regex '/coverage: \d+\.\d+% of statements/'. Also in the build stage add a codeclimate job that pulls the codeclimate/codeclimate image, runs "docker run -e CODECLIMATE_CODE=\"$(pwd)\" -v \"$(pwd)\":/code -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v /tmp/cc:/tmp/cc codeclimate/codeclimate engines:install" and then "docker run -e CODECLIMATE_CODE=\"$(pwd)\" -v \"$(pwd)\":/code -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v /tmp/cc:/tmp/cc codeclimate/codeclimate analyze -f json > codeclimate.json", publishing codeclimate.json as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy review job that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/recalbox/ops/rancher-cli:0.6.2, defines environment name "review/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}" with URL https://${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG}-recaleur-prod.recalbox.com, runs "rancher rm ${STACK}/${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG} || true", updates files with "sed \"s/RANCHER_SERVICENAME/${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG}/\" -i docker-compose.yml rancher-compose.yml", and brings up the stack with "FQDN=${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG}-recaleur-prod.recalbox.com rancher up -d --pull -u --force-upgrade -s ${STACK}", and sets variables RECALEUR_CANARY=256 and RECALEUR_RESPONSE=test. Also add a clean review job that runs manually, uses the same rancher-cli image, stops the environment by echoing "cleaning ${IMAGE} from ${STACK}/${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG}" and executing "rancher rm ${STACK}/${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG}", and is linked as the on_stop action for the deploy review environment.
